# MUSE тАФ The AI Coding Governance System

> Roles, Memory, Skills, in Plain Markdown. Zero dependencies.

MUSE is the only full governance system for AI pair programming. It goes beyond format specs (AGENTS.md, .cursorrules) and memory infrastructure (mem0, MemOS) by providing role isolation, persistent memory, 65 skills, cross-role directives, TF-IDF search, and visual dashboards тАФ all in pure Markdown.

## Core Concept

AGENTS.md defines the format. MUSE builds the system.

MUSE wraps AI coding assistants with a governance protocol that enables:
- Role-based context isolation (build, qa, growth, strategy)
- Dual-layer memory persistence (short-term + long-term)
- 65 reusable skills loaded on demand
- Cross-role async directive queue with delivery tracking
- TF-IDF search across all project context
- Web Dashboard + VS Code Extension for visualization

## Layer Model

```
L3  Memory Infrastructure   mem0 ┬╖ MemOS ┬╖ memsearch     тЖР MUSE doesn't compete here
L2  Governance System       ЁЯОн MUSE                       тЖР Only player at this layer
L1  Workflow Kits           Spec Kit ┬╖ sudocode            тЖР MUSE covers this + more
L0  Format Specs            AGENTS.md ┬╖ .cursorrules       тЖР MUSE is compatible
```

## Key Features

- **Two-Layer Memory**: Daily logs (`memory/YYYY-MM-DD.md`) + long-term lessons (`MEMORIES.md`)
- **Role Isolation**: Build, QA, Growth, Strategy тАФ each role reads only its own state file
- **Directive Queue**: Async cross-role messaging with ЁЯЯб/тЬЕ status protocol
- **MCP Server**: Built-in Bash MCP server with 6 JSON-RPC tools, zero dependencies
- **65 Skills**: Core (7) + Toolkit (45) + Ecosystem (13) reusable skill packs
- **Builder Ethos**: 5 core principles for AI-governed development (Boil the Lake, Search Before Building, Ship the Narrowest Wedge, Memory Over Momentum, Governance Is Speed)
- **Sprint Pipeline**: `/sprint` тАФ 7-phase feature development workflow (ThinkтЖТPlanтЖТBuildтЖТReviewтЖТTestтЖТShipтЖТReflect)
- **Weekly Retro**: `/retro` тАФ automated retrospective from memory logs + git history
- **Git Security Guard**: Pre-commit/push secret leak prevention for API keys, tokens, private keys, .env files
- **Systematic Debugging v2**: L1тЖТL4 pressure escalation with passive behavior detection and anti-rationalization
- **Graph Memory Relations**: Memory entries auto-detect relationships тАФ UPDATES (supersede old facts with ~~strikethrough~~), EXTENDS (sub-details), DERIVES (inferences), NEW. Pure Markdown graph, zero vector DB.
- **Auto-Expiry Temporal Tagging**: Memory classified at write time as `[PERMANENT]` (never expires), `[TEMPORAL:YYYY-MM-DD]` (auto-expires), or `[EPISODIC]` (fades after 3 days). `/resume` auto-filters expired entries.
- **Unexecuted Directive Scan**: `/resume` Step 2.8 surfaces buried ЁЯЯб received-but-unexecuted directives in role files, preventing lost work in long documents.
- **Static/Dynamic User Profile**: `USER.md` split into Static Profile (permanent preferences, always loaded) and Dynamic Profile (recent work focus, auto-updated by `/bye`, `/resume` loads only 7-day window).
- **BUILDтЖТQA AC Dual-Write Protocol**: Acceptance Criteria simultaneously written to both `build.md` and `qa.md` with unified `AC-SXXX-NN` numbering. QA force re-reads latest AC on resume. Prevents cross-conversation AC sync failures.
- **Coordinator Mode**: Multi-agent coordination SOP тАФ understand first, then write self-contained specs. Never forward raw chat history. Extracted from Claude Code internal architecture.
- **Iterative Retrieval**: Progressive context refinement replacing single-pass search. SearchтЖТrefineтЖТsearch until confident.
- **SOP Layer Evolution**: Memory 4-category taxonomy (user_preference/feedback/project_knowledge/reference), drift detection (>7 days warning), coordinator iron law, absolute dates enforcement.
- **TF-IDF Search**: Zero-dependency ranked search across memory, roles, and skills
- **Auto Memory Capture**: Automatic LESSON/DECISION/FACT extraction on session end
- **Semantic Compression**: 3-tier context compression based on session length
- **Session Checkpoint**: Silent progress save every 15 interaction rounds
- **Defensive Auto-Save**: Crash recovery with at most 10 rounds of data loss
- **Web Dashboard**: Online at muse.mythslabs.ai/dashboard (100% client-side)
- **VS Code Extension**: Roles, Skills, Memory tree views + in-editor dashboard

## Quick Start

```bash
git clone https://github.com/myths-labs/muse.git
cd muse && ./setup.sh
```

## Commands

- `/resume [role]` тАФ Boot and restore context
- `/bye` тАФ One-click wrap-up, auto-save
- `/sprint` тАФ Feature dev pipeline: ThinkтЖТPlanтЖТBuildтЖТReviewтЖТTestтЖТShipтЖТReflect
- `/retro` тАФ Weekly retrospective from memory + git history
- `/ctx` тАФ Context health check (ЁЯЯвЁЯЯбЁЯФ┤)
- `/distill` тАФ Condense daily logs to long-term memory
- `/search` тАФ TF-IDF search across memory, roles, skills
- `/sync` тАФ Cross-role synchronization
- `/settings` тАФ Change language, model, preferences

## Supported Tools

| Tool | Install Command |
|------|----------------|
| Claude Code | `./scripts/install.sh --tool claude` |
| Cursor | `./scripts/install.sh --tool cursor` |
| Windsurf | `./scripts/install.sh --tool windsurf` |
| Gemini CLI | `./scripts/install.sh --tool gemini` |
| Codex CLI | `./scripts/install.sh --tool codex` |
| OpenClaw | `./scripts/install.sh --tool openclaw` |
